svg.title: End user flow diagram — from sign up to loyalty loop
svg.desc: User journey: sign up with OTP, complete profile, browse test panels, select panel, check price and discount, book appointment, pay, receive confirmation, visit lab, get report, download certificate, loyalty loop triggers discount.
svg.text: What the end user experiences — B2C direct booking

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does a user first access the portal?')
sendPrompt('How does OTP-based sign up work for users?')
g.text: No password needed, OTP via SMS

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What profile details does a user fill in after signing up?')

svg.text: Browsing — every time they need a test

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does a user browse test panels?')
g.text: Filter by city, lab, test type

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What information does a user see when selecting a panel?')
sendPrompt('How does slot selection work for the user?')
sendPrompt('What payment methods does the user see at checkout?')
sendPrompt('What confirmation does the user receive after booking?')
sendPrompt('What should the user bring or do when visiting the lab?')
sendPrompt('How does the user get notified when their report is ready?')
